THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, ALL PARTIES WERE PRESENT. THE COURT ORDERS THAT THE JUDGMENT ($4,944.71) BE PAID IN INSTALLMENTS OF $200.00 OR MORE PER MONTH. THE 1ST PAYNMENT IS DUE ON OR BEFORE JAN-31-09, AND THE REMAINING PAYMENTS ARE TO COMMENCE ON FEB-15-09, AND CONTINUE ON THE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER, UNTIL FULLY PAID, OR BY FURTHER COURT ORDER. IF ANY PAYMENTS ARE MISSED THE ENTIRE BALANCE SHALL BECOME DUE IMMEDIATELY. (OEX DISCHARGED)CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506
